heading: Annual estimates of quantity of paper required for public printing and binding
label: 508 Annual estimates of quantity of paper required for public printing and binding
text: At the beginning of each session of Congress, the Director of the Government Publishing Office shall submit to the Joint Committee on Printing estimates of the quantity of paper of all descriptions required for the public printing and binding during the ensuing year.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 36 (, ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 2628 Stat. 604
Amendments2014— substituted “Director of the Government Publishing Office” for “Public Printer”.Pub. L. 113–235
